basic_details.job_title: CMO Kushinagar District Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical Officer, Kushinagar (CMO Kushinagar) District Programme Coordinator (DPC) Notification 2026 has been released on 31 May 2026 on the official website of CMO Kushinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CMO Kushinagar District Programme Coordinator (DPC) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: District Programme Coordinator: MBBS/BHMS/BAMS/BUMS/BDS with minimum 5 years experience. Preferable: MBA in Healthcare or Master of Health/Hospital Administration or Master of Public Health / full time Regular University Degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMO Kushinagar District Programme Coordinator (DPC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Kushinagar District Programme Coordinator (DPC) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the CMO Kushinagar District Programme Coordinator (DPC) Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the District Programme Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the District Programme Coordinator post in the CMO Kushinagar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the District Programme Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/BHMS/BAMS/BUMS/BDS degree with a minimum of 5 years of experience. A preference is given to those with an MBA in Healthcare or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 40 years as of 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the District Programme Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the District Programme Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the District Programme Coordinator post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Chief Medical Officer, Kushinagar.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.
